summary: Built the Communication capability with a multi-channel dispatcher (prepare_send returns SendRequest, does NOT send), autonomy-aware approval gate (reads autonomy.yaml thresholds + always/never escalate lists), in-memory rate limiter (dedup by recipient+content_hash within window), and 4 markdown templates (base, acknowledgment, escalation-notice, follow-up) with {{variable}} substitution. All outbound events logged to audit trail. All 5 scenarios pass.
decisions: prepare_send action defaults to 'send_{channel}' which matches always_escalate list (send_email is escalated)
Rate limiter is in-memory only — acceptable for Layer 1 single-instance
Template engine is simple string.replace — no Jinja dependency needed
broadcast: Communication API: dispatch.prepare_send(recipient, content, channel, employee) → SendRequest dict. approval.check_approval(action, confidence, employee) → decision. Templates use {{variable}} syntax. Communication does NOT send — it prepares. rice-integration wires actual sending.
